title: Boiled Greek Chicken Stir-fry
description: A floral and dense romantic greek dish featuring chicken drumsticks, infused with herbs and served as a light breakfast.
instructions: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and a generous amount of olive oil.
Place seasoned chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes or until juices run clear and cooked through.
While chicken roasts, mix minced garlic, thyme, rosemary, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Once chicken is done, remove from oven and let it rest for a few minutes before slicing into thin pieces.
Warm the seasoned herbs mixture over medium heat until fragrant. Do not allow to boil.
Stir-fry sliced chicken with warm herb mixture in a pan or wok for about 2-3 minutes or until heated through.
Serve hot as a light breakfast.
